name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: state[i] = idle

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N: /\ state[i] = idle
                     /\ state[i] = trying
          \/ \E i \in 1..N: /\ state[i] = trying
                     /\ state[i] = critical
          \/ \E i \in 1..N: /\ state[i] = critical
                     /\ state[i] = idle

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = 0
       /\ flag = 0
       /\ maxFlag = 0
       /\ maxNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = IF flag' THEN num ELSE num' + 1
       /\ flag' = IF flag THEN flag ELSE flag' + 1
       /\ maxNum' = IF maxFlag' THEN maxNum ELSE maxNum' + 1
       /\ maxFlag' = IF maxFlag THEN maxFlag ELSE maxFlag' + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
              /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r \in readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
              /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY, FiniteSet, Subset
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sent_chunks \in FiniteSet
    /\ retransmit_count \in FiniteSet
    /\ channel \in FiniteSet

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in Seq :
        /\ chunk \in Subset(CHUNK_SIZE)
        /\ chunk \notin sent_chunks
        /\ \E loss \in {TRUE, FALSE}
            /\ loss = (Random < CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY)
            /\ IF loss
                THEN /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \cup {chunk}
                     /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count \cup {chunk}
                     /\ channel' = channel \cup {chunk}

                     /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
                     /\ channel' = channel
    /\ \E chunk \in sent_chunks :
        /\ \E loss \in {TRUE, FALSE}
            /\ loss = (Random < CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY)
            /\ IF loss
                THEN /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
                     /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
                     /\ channel' = channel \cup {chunk}

                     /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count \cup {chunk}
                     /\ channel' = channel
    /\ \E chunk \in retransmit_count :
        /\ \E loss \in {TRUE, FALSE}
            /\ loss = (Random < CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY)
            /\ IF loss
                THEN /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
                     /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
                     /\ channel' = channel \cup {chunk}

                     /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count \cup {chunk}
                     /\ channel' = channel

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, channel>>
